description: A custom pointer that replaces the default cursor across the whole page. It is a small hollow ring that trails the real pointer with a slight lag, easing toward its target each frame so movement feels weighted rather than instant. Over interactive elements the ring grows and fills, and when hovering a link it snaps toward the element's center as if magnetized. The native cursor is hidden. It sits above all content and does not occupy any layout space. Mechanism: a fixed element is moved every animation frame toward the last pointer position with linear interpolation, and hover handlers scale and re-target it.
retrieval_probes: custom cursor that follows the mouse with lag
magnetic cursor that snaps to links on hover
circle cursor with smooth trailing motion
minimal ring pointer replacing the default cursor
notes: Pointer-driven; disable on touch devices (no hover).
